sentences.arabic: انْتَشَرَ اسْتِخْدَامُ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ بِشَكْلٍ وَاسِعٍ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ مُؤَخَّرًا.
sentences.translation: Upotreba interneta se nedavno široko proširila u arapskom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The use of the internet has spread widely in the Arab world recently.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّبَابُ الْعَرَبِيُّ الْمَنَصَّاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةَ لِمُشَارَكَةِ أَفْكَارِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Arapska omladina koristi digitalne platforme za dijeljenje svojih ideja.
sentences.translationEn: Arab youth use digital platforms to share their ideas.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاهِمُ التِّقْنِيَّةُ الْحَدِيثَةُ فِي تَطْوِيرِ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ وَتَسْهِيلِ الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Moderna tehnologija doprinosi razvoju društava i olakšavanju života.
sentences.translationEn: Modern technology contributes to the development of societies and making life easier.
